name: Release Notes 3.12.7 - API Updates
body:
Release Notes 3.12.7 - API Updates

Release Date: 28-10-2020

In this release we've resolved an issue with the Webstore/eCommerce API integration. 

Webstore/eCommerce APIResolved an issue where products are sold for $0 (e.g. when a voucher covers the cost of the sale) but tax is still charged.
